template_params: Dr. Meera, JIDA ka Oct issue (p.14) dekha aapne? Ek multi-center Indian trial (n=2,100) mein paya gaya ki high-risk adul
trg_001_research_digest_dentists::m_001_.body: Dr. Meera, JIDA ka Oct issue (p.14) dekha aapne? Ek multi-center Indian trial (n=2,100) mein paya gaya ki high-risk adult patients ke liye 3-month fluoride varnish recall ne caries recurrence 38% reduce kiya vs 6-month schedule. Aapke clinic ke 124 high-risk patients ke liye ye kaafi relevant ho sakta hai. Kya main iska full abstract nikaloon ya in patients ke liye ek educational WhatsApp draft kar doon?
trg_001_research_digest_dentists::m_001_.rationale: Used the JIDA research signal (n=2100, 38% reduction) and anchored it to the merchant's specific cohort of 124 high-risk patients to provide clinical value and offer effort externalization.

template_params: Dr. Meera, DCI circular (2026-11-04) ke according 15 Dec 2026 se radiograph dose limits change ho rahi hain. IOPA exposu
trg_002_compliance_dci_radiograph::m_001.body: Dr. Meera, DCI circular (2026-11-04) ke according 15 Dec 2026 se radiograph dose limits change ho rahi hain. IOPA exposure limit 1.5 mSv se drop hokar 1.0 mSv ho jayegi. Iska direct impact ye hai ki D-speed film ab compliant nahi rahegi—only E-speed or Digital RVG sensors will pass the new limit. Aapke clinic ke SOPs update karne ke liye maine ek compliance checklist ready ki hai. Kya main share karoon ya aapka setup already digital RVG par shifted hai?
trg_002_compliance_dci_radiograph::m_001.rationale: Used the DCI compliance signal with specific dose numbers (1.5 to 1.0 mSv) and the Dec 15 deadline to offer proactive compliance help via reciprocity.

template_params: Hi Priya, Dr. Meera's clinic se message hai 🦷 Aapka last visit 12th May ko tha — it's been 6 months and aapka cleaning r
trg_003_recall_due_priya::m_001_drmeera_.body: Hi Priya, Dr. Meera's clinic se message hai 🦷 Aapka last visit 12th May ko tha — it's been 6 months and aapka cleaning recall due hai. Oral hygiene maintain karne ke liye scaling zaroori hai. Humare paas aapke liye 'Dental Cleaning @ ₹299' ka offer active hai. Maine aapke liye 2 slots check kiye hain: Wed 5 Nov, 6pm ya Thu 6 Nov, 5pm. Kaunsa time aapko suit karega?
trg_003_recall_due_priya::m_001_drmeera_.rationale: Used the 6-month recall trigger with specific last visit date, active ₹299 offer, and pre-selected slots to minimize booking friction for the lapsed customer.

template_params: Dr. Bharat, last 7 days mein calls 50% drop hui hain. Aapka current CTR 1.8% hai, jo peer median (3.0%) se 40% niche cha
trg_004_perf_dip_bharat::m_002_bharat_de.body: Dr. Bharat, last 7 days mein calls 50% drop hui hain. Aapka current CTR 1.8% hai, jo peer median (3.0%) se 40% niche chal raha hai. Profile par koi active offer na hone ki wajah se visibility kam ho rahi hai. Main aapke liye 'Dental Cleaning @ ₹299' ka category-standard offer live kar sakti hoon taaki patient inquiries wapas track par aa sakein. Kya main ise activate kar doon?
trg_004_perf_dip_bharat::m_002_bharat_de.rationale: Used the 50% call drop and 1.8% vs 3.0% CTR gap to drive urgency, then offered to activate the ₹299 cleaning offer to fix it.

template_params: Dr. Bharat, aapka Pro plan 12 days mein expire ho raha hai. Is renewal se pehle ek critical observation: last 7 days mei
trg_005_renewal_due_bharat::m_002_bharat.body: Dr. Bharat, aapka Pro plan 12 days mein expire ho raha hai. Is renewal se pehle ek critical observation: last 7 days mein calls 50% drop hui hain aur aapka CTR (1.8%) peer clinics ke 3.0% benchmark se 40% niche hai. Currently, 95 lapsed patients hain jinse ₹1,24,616 ki potential revenue recover ho sakti hai. Kya main in patients ke liye ek specific 'Scaling & Recall' campaign draft karoon taaki renewal se pehle hum ye gap bridge kar sakein?
trg_005_renewal_due_bharat::m_002_bharat.rationale: Combined the renewal urgency with a high-value lapsed revenue signal (₹1.24L) and performance dip (50% calls) to justify the subscription value.

template_params: Lakshmi, Diwali 188 days door hai par Kapra mein festive planning abhi se start ho gayi hai. Aapka CTR 4.8% hai—20% high
trg_006_festival_diwali::m_003_studio11_.body: Lakshmi, Diwali 188 days door hai par Kapra mein festive planning abhi se start ho gayi hai. Aapka CTR 4.8% hai—20% higher than your peers! Competitors se pehle 'Haircut @ ₹99' offer promote karke early bookings lock karein? Main campaign draft kar deti hoon, bas YES reply karo.
trg_006_festival_diwali::m_003_studio11_.rationale: Leveraged the 188-day Diwali countdown and the merchant's superior 4.8% CTR to suggest an early-bird campaign for their ₹99 haircut offer.

trg_007_bridal_followup_kavya::m_003_stu.rationale: Used the specific trial date (March 22) and wedding date (Nov 8) to trigger the 30-day skin prep program mentioned in the trigger context, leveraging the summer seasonality signal.

template_params: Hi Lakshmi, Studio11 ki performance kaafi strong chal rahi hai! Last 7 days mein calls 20% badh gaye hain aur aapka CTR

Abhi summer hair-care surge ka time hai, toh 'Hair Spa @ ₹499' jaise offers kaafi attract kar rahe hain. Aapke experience se, is week Kapra mein kaunse service ki demand sabse zyada lag rahi hai?
trg_008_curious_ask_studio11::m_003_stud.rationale: Used call growth (20%) and CTR gap (4.8% vs 4.0%) to build confidence, then asked for local market insight to engage the merchant.

trg_009_winback_glamour::m_004_glamour_s.rationale: Used the 30% call dip and 45% CTR gap vs peers to create urgency, then linked it to the upcoming summer hair-care seasonal beat.

trg_010_ipl_match_delhi::m_005_pizzajunc.rationale: Used the CTR gap (2.0% vs 2.5%) and call growth (10%) to suggest extending the existing BOGO offer for the local IPL match.

template_params: Suresh, last 30 days mein 4 reviews ne same delivery issue highlight kiya hai. Ek customer ne likha: 'took 50 mins for a
trg_011_review_theme_late_delivery::m_00.body: Suresh, last 30 days mein 4 reviews ne same delivery issue highlight kiya hai. Ek customer ne likha: 'took 50 mins for a 15 min ride'. Is negative feedback ki wajah se aapka CTR 2.0% par stuck hai—which is 20% below your peers (2.5%). Corporate package ke liye hum 'Office Thali Box' set kar sakte hain: ₹149 thali + complimentary buttermilk for orders above 10 covers. Aapke 4,200 unique customers mein se kaafi office-goers hain. Kya aap ek lunch shift mein 30-40 bulk covers handle kar payenge?
trg_013_corporate_thali_planning::m_006_.rationale: Used the 3.2% CTR and 4,200 customer count to validate the merchant's intent for a corporate package, suggesting a specific 'covers' threshold for the bulk offer.

template_params: Karthik, last 7 days mein views 30% aur calls 35% drop hue hain. Apr-Jun usually lowest acquisition window hoti hai, but
trg_014_seasonal_acquisition_dip_powerho.body: Karthik, last 7 days mein views 30% aur calls 35% drop hue hain. trg_015_winback_rashmi::m_007_powerhouse.rationale: Used the 57-day lapse and weight loss focus to create loss aversion, paired with a specific ₹499 winback offer from the catalog.

trg_017_kids_yoga_trial_followup_karthik.rationale: Used the specific trial date (April 22) and the next available slot (May 3) combined with the ₹499 offer to encourage conversion from trial to paid member.

template_params: Ramesh, aapke 240 chronic Rx patients ki list filter kar li hai. Inme se jo MfrZ atorvastatin (Batch AT2024-1102 ya 1108
trg_018_supply_atorvastatin_recall::m_00.body: Ramesh, aapke 240 chronic Rx patients ki list filter kar li hai. Kya main in patients ke liye recall alert aur summer essentials ka ek draft message bhej doon?
trg_018_supply_atorvastatin_recall::m_00.rationale: Followed up on the atorvastatin recall request using the 240 chronic patient count and linked it to the 8% call increase and seasonal summer surge.

trg_019_chronic_refill_grandfather::m_00.body: Namaste Mr. Sharma, Apollo Health Plus Pharmacy se Ramesh bol raha hoon. Treatment continuity ke liye timely refill zaroori hai. ₹499 se upar ke orders par humari Free Home Delivery active hai. Kya main aapka order pack karke kal morning slot mein bhej doon?
trg_019_chronic_refill_grandfather::m_00.rationale: Used the chronic_refill_due signal for specific molecules and the April 28 deadline to create urgency, while leveraging the free delivery offer for effort externalization.

template_params: Ramesh, aapke store ki performance badh rahi hai—last 7 days mein views 6% aur calls 8% up hain. Summer surge start ho c

Kya main in summer essentials ka ek special digital catalog update kar doon?
trg_020_summer_demand_shift::m_009_apoll.rationale: Used performance growth (6% views/8% calls) and seasonal demand spikes (40% ORS/45% antifungal) to suggest a catalog update for the 1,820 customers.

template_params: Vikas, Sunrise Medicos ka performance Gomti Nagar mein kaafi strong hai—last 7 days mein calls 5% badhi hain aur aapka C

Kya main verification process setup karne mein aapki help karoon?
trg_021_unverified_gbp_sunrise::m_010_su.rationale: Used the GBP unverified trigger with a 30% uplift estimate, anchored on the 5% call growth and 4.1% CTR to show momentum, and tied it to the summer seasonal surge.

template_params: Dr. Meera, IDA ka upcoming webinar (2 CDE credits) is worth a look, especially for managing high-risk cases. Aapke roste
trg_022_cde_webinar_dentists::m_001_drme.body: Dr. Meera, IDA ka upcoming webinar (2 CDE credits) is worth a look, especially for managing high-risk cases. trg_022_cde_webinar_dentists::m_001_drme.rationale: Linked the CDE webinar trigger to the specific CTR gap (2.1% vs 3.0%) and the high-risk patient count (124) to drive profile optimization.
